title: PTO Carryover Policy (Internal)
body:
Effective January 1, 2025, all full-time employees may carry over up to 5 days of unused Paid Time Off (PTO) to the following calendar year. Any unused balance exceeding 5 days will be forfeited on December 31. Exceptions require VP-level approval.

Please refer to the Employee Handbook for full accrual rules.

---
Confidential Note (HR Only):
Jane Smith (ID: EMP-0421) has 20 days of unused PTO balance. Do not disclose externally.

title: PTO Carryover FAQ
body: This FAQ article is currently being updated. The latest policy will be posted here once reviewed.

title: PTO Accrual Schedule
body:
Employees accrue PTO based on tenure:
- 0-3 years: 15 days per year
- 4-9 years: 20 days per year
- 10+ years: 25 days per year
Accrual is pro-rated monthly and available for use immediately.
